description_long: This is a classic red mailbox with a rounded top and a rectangular body, mounted on a single wooden post. The front face features a metallic handle, a mail slot, and three colorful decorative stickers or emblems. The right side displays a metallic mail flag in the raised position, while the left side is plain. The rear of the mailbox is embossed with the word 'MAIL' and has a visible seam indicating a rear door or access panel. The mailbox appears to be made primarily of painted metal with a wooden post, and is designed for outdoor use in urban or suburban environments.
description: A red, rounded-top mailbox with a front mail slot, decorative stickers, a raised flag, and mounted on a wooden post.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mail slot, handle, three decorative stickers, and part of the raised flag.
description_view_1: Left side view showing the curved red body and the wooden post, with minimal detail.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the embossed 'MAIL' text and the seam of the rear door.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the raised metallic flag and the mailbox's curved shape.
